results.name: Active Damping Three-Phase LCL Filter
results.rationale: Three-phase LCL filter parallels 3-ply layered filter structure (kw: damping, filter); active damping matches feedback-attenuation form.

decision_rationale: 3 of 8 results trigger hit threshold: Low-Pass Filtering SGD (func=0.72 on convection-smoothing), Adaptive Gradient Spiking (kw>=2 on adaptive+gradient), Active Damping LCL Filter (kw>=2 on damping+filter, structural parallel to 3-ply). Core composite mechanism is not jointly present but individual components have precedents. Verifier verdict FAIL agrees with primary (verdict-level agreement; primary 8 hits sem 0.74-0.92 / func 0.74-0.92 on broader adjacency cluster, verifier 3 hits per-paper stricter).
